task.goal: Migrate narrative from removed .planning-archive/2026-03-29-pre-barebones/ into apps/portfolio/content/docs/documentation/requirements.mdx (Planning archive section) and registries; ROADMAP.xml + TASK-REGISTRY.xml updated; archive folder deleted.

Add a shared logging layer for server and client flows, then instrument the assistant-ui chat path so request, retrieval, upstream, and error handling are easy to debug without permanent ad hoc console logs.

Implement the blog and projects content-discovery pass after the planning loop: searchable/filterable index pages, command-palette hit flow, strict article/project structure, and matching docs-side records.

commands.command: if (Test-Path apps/portfolio/.next/lock) { Remove-Item -Force apps/portfolio/.next/lock }; pnpm --filter @portfolio/app test:e2e

task.goal: Books EPUB planning supplement: repeatable `repub epub --planning <dir>`, `runEpub` appendix for md/mdx/xml/toml/txt, `scripts/build-books.cjs` reads `book.json` epubPlanningDirs; Mordred's Tale bundles `apps/portfolio/content/docs/books/planning`. Section registry: `books-reader-02-02` done; docs in books planning-docs.mdx.

Phase 01 CLI baseline: planning --version (repo-planner package.json), repub --version, engines.node >= 22 on root + @portfolio/repub-builder + vendor/repo-planner; --help/subcommands already in loop-cli; Ink TTY + npm publish + pnpm dlx matrix remain documentation-site-07 / repo-planner-integration-01-13.
Retrofit the existing blog posts and project writeups to the strict literal section contracts and richer metadata expected by the new discovery shell, then lock that contract with a regression test.

commands.command: if (Test-Path apps/portfolio/.next/lock) { Remove-Item -Force apps/portfolio/.next/lock }; pnpm --filter @portfolio/app test:e2e

task.goal: Repo Planner phase 04: build-time `builtin-packs.json` from `.planning` + docs MDX; `repo-planner` exports `PlanningPackGallery` (data-in props); portfolio modal shell only; cockpit preloads init + docs packs; root `pnpm planning:embed-packs`; hook into app dev/build. Registry: repo-planner-integration-04 in apps/portfolio/content/docs/repo-planner/planning/task-registry.mdx.
Normalize `.planning` and operator-facing planning docs to an ASCII-first punctuation policy so CLI, shell, and XML surfaces stay readable without changing public-facing prose typography.

Planning IA reset: move section planning docs into literal `planning/` folders, align root/operator guidance on roadmap/state/task-registry/decisions as the living loop, sweep stale flat links, and verify the planning-pack/build pipeline still resolves the new paths.

Standardize the agent loop around a Global-first human entrypoint, kickoff records for vague phases, explicit definition of done, and tests-required-for-done for executable behavior; seed RepoPlanner planning for workflow-aware snapshot, kickoff scaffolding, done gates, and ownership guidance.

Establish the shared auth foundation for gated site features: Payload auth-enabled owner user, tenant/org seed, long-lived session policy, local auto-login in development, and entitlement helpers that Books and Listen can consume.
